---
name: Pull request
about: Submit changes to InsightLoop
---

## What & why
Describe the change and link the issue it closes (if any).

## How to test
Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change locally.

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran `ruff check . && ruff format .` locally
- [ ] I ran `pytest` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I updated the docs (README / docs/) if behaviour or public API changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] My change is small and focused (one logical change per PR)

## Screenshots / logs
If relevant, attach screenshots or terminal output.
